content:
Table: action_history

Columns:
  - id (VARCHAR(36))
  - conversation_id (VARCHAR(36), nullable)
  - action_type (VARCHAR(50))
  - action_data (LONGTEXT)
  - result (LONGTEXT, nullable)
  - status (VARCHAR(50), nullable)
  - error_message (TEXT, nullable)
  - executed_at (DATETIME, nullable)

Primary Key: id

Table: api_configs

Columns:
  - id (VARCHAR(36))
  - name (VARCHAR(255))
  - api_type (VARCHAR(50))
  - endpoint (VARCHAR(500))
  - method (VARCHAR(20), nullable)
  - headers (LONGTEXT, nullable)
  - auth_type (VARCHAR(50), nullable)
  - auth_value (VARCHAR(500), nullable)
  - params_template (LONGTEXT, nullable)
  - created_at (DATETIME, nullable)

Primary Key: id

Table: business_rules

Columns:
  - id (VARCHAR(36))
  - name (VARCHAR(255))
  - description (TEXT, nullable)
  - rule_type (VARCHAR(50))
  - content (TEXT)
  - category (VARCHAR(100), nullable)
  - is_active (TINYINT, nullable)
  - created_at (DATETIME, nullable)

Primary Key: id

Table: conversations

Columns:
  - id (VARCHAR(36))
  - title (VARCHAR(255), nullable)
  - created_at (DATETIME, nullable)
  - updated_at (DATETIME, nullable)

Primary Key: id

Table: database_settings

Columns:
  - id (VARCHAR(36))
  - name (VARCHAR(255))
  - db_type (VARCHAR(50))
  - host (VARCHAR(255), nullable)
  - port (INTEGER, nullable)
  - database (VARCHAR(255))
  - username (VARCHAR(255), nullable)
  - password (VARCHAR(255), nullable)
  - is_active (TINYINT, nullable)
  - created_at (DATETIME, nullable)

Primary Key: id

Table: llm_models

Columns:
  - id (VARCHAR(36))
  - name (VARCHAR(255))
  - model_type (VARCHAR(50))
  - model_id (VARCHAR(255))
  - api_key (VARCHAR(500), nullable)
  - api_endpoint (VARCHAR(500), nullable)
  - priority (INTEGER, nullable)
  - is_active (TINYINT, nullable)
  - config (LONGTEXT, nullable)
  - created_at (DATETIME, nullable)

Primary Key: id

Table: messages

Columns:
  - id (VARCHAR(36))
  - conversation_id (VARCHAR(36)) [conversations]
  - role (VARCHAR(20))
  - content (TEXT)
  - action_data (LONGTEXT, nullable)
  - action_executed (TINYINT, nullable)
  - action_result (LONGTEXT, nullable)
  - created_at (DATETIME, nullable)

Primary Key: id

Table: rag_items

Columns:
  - id (VARCHAR(36))
  - category (VARCHAR(100))
  - title (VARCHAR(255))
  - content (TEXT)
  - source (VARCHAR(100), nullable)
  - created_at (DATETIME, nullable)
  - updated_at (DATETIME, nullable)

Primary Key: id

Table: reports

Columns:
  - id (VARCHAR(36))
  - title (VARCHAR(255))
  - description (TEXT, nullable)
  - report_type (VARCHAR(50))
  - data (LONGTEXT)
  - action_ids (LONGTEXT, nullable)
  - created_at (DATETIME, nullable)

Primary Key: id

Table: scheduled_activities

Columns:
  - id (VARCHAR(36))
  - conversation_id (VARCHAR(36), nullable)
  - title (VARCHAR(255))
  - action_type (VARCHAR(50))
  - action_data (LONGTEXT)
  - scheduled_for (DATETIME)
  - recurrence (VARCHAR(50), nullable)
  - is_active (TINYINT, nullable)
  - last_executed (DATETIME, nullable)
  - next_execution (DATETIME, nullable)
  - created_at (DATETIME, nullable)

Primary Key: id

Table: schema_info

Columns:
  - id (VARCHAR(36))
  - table_name (VARCHAR(255))
  - column_name (VARCHAR(255))
  - column_type (VARCHAR(100))
  - sample_values (LONGTEXT, nullable)
  - description (TEXT, nullable)
  - embedding_id (VARCHAR(255), nullable)
  - created_at (DATETIME, nullable)

Primary Key: id
